query: heavy lens flare sun glare washout veil photograph haze
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: lens flare overload — sun glare, washout, hexagonal flare artifacts, veiled hazy aesthetic

response.objective_caption: A circular wall-mounted light fixture positioned near the junction of two walls. The fixture emits an intense white glow that radiates outward in a starburst pattern and casts a large circular ring of light across the right side of the frame. The left wall appears brightly lit with a visible textured surface, while the surrounding area recedes into darkness. A small rectangular metal bracket is visible at the corner where the walls meet.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A circular wall-mounted light fixture near a wall corner, captured with extreme exposure extremes that blow out the left wall and the light source into featureless white, erasing all surface detail. The intense glow radiates in a starburst pattern and produces a large circular ring of purple-blue flare that washes across the dark right side of the frame, while the surrounding environment is plunged into near-total shadow with crushed blacks.
